description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.27.0 adds Windows support for the upstream 0.27 API quota provider work with ElevenLabs, Deepgram, GroqCloud metrics, and LLM Proxy providers; adds Settings/API-key setup, provider icons, chart colors, and CLI config helpers; and updates the provider catalog to 45 providers.
